headline: Why Dow Stock Is on an Epic Losing Streak
summary: Shares of commodity chemical producer  Dow  have had a rough time lately.  Dow stock was down 1.5% in early trading on Tuesday at $27.51, on pace for its 11th consecutive drop.  Today’s price would be the lowest close since Jan. 29, 2026, when it closed at $27.16, according to Dow Jones Market Data.
